sentences.english: I'm moving out at the end of this month and I'd like to schedule the move-out inspection.
sentences.korean: 이달 말에 퇴거하는데 퇴거 점검 일정을 잡고 싶어요.

sentences.english: We can do it on your last day.
What condition is the apartment in?
Everything is in good condition except for a small scratch on the kitchen counter.
sentences.korean: 부엌 조리대의 작은 흠집을 제외하면 모두 양호한 상태예요.

sentences.english: Minor scratches are considered normal wear and tear so that shouldn't affect your deposit.
sentences.korean: 경미한 흠집은 정상적인 마모로 간주되니 보증금에 영향 없을 거예요.

sentences.english: When can I expect to get my deposit back?
Within thirty days of the inspection as stated in your lease agreement.
sentences.korean: 임대 계약서에 명시된 대로 점검 후 30일 이내입니다.

quiz.question: What does '정상적 마모' mean in English?
